name: kesefle
description: Kesefle — Hebrew WhatsApp expense bot + web app. This package.json exists to give CI and developers a single 'npm test' entry point; the runtime (website + API) deploys via Vercel and the bot via Apps Script.

scripts.test:bot: node bot/test_isolation.js && node bot/test_isolation_edge_cases.js && node bot/test_classify.js && node bot/test_destructive_delete_confirm.js && node bot/test_tool_destructive_gating.js
